scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && (cp index.html dist/ || true) && (cp events.html dist/ || true) && (cp admin-login.html dist/ || true) && (cp admin-dashboard.html dist/ || true) && (cp admin.html dist/ || true) && (cp script.js dist/ || true) && (cp styles.css dist/ || true) && (cp MobileLandingPage.css dist/ || true) && (cp -r assets dist/ || true)
